description: Tray.ai is an enterprise orchestration platform for integrations, automation, and AI agents. It lets organizations build workflows, manage connector-based integrations, publish APIs, and expose Tray capabilities through a hosted MCP server.
summary: tray.ai exposes Tray Platform HTTP APIs, a Tray Embedded GraphQL API, a hosted MCP server at regional `api*.tray.io/mcp` endpoints, and tenant/project-specific published HTTP APIs via Tray API Management; all documented surfaces require authentication.
